summary: Tested P1/P2/P3 features for Solomon AI iteration 91. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. P1: CSV Import with Planning Center auto-mapping working, Disputes scaffold returns summary with win_rate, Fraud risk scores returns high_value_transactions_30d. P2: CORS is NOT wildcard (locked to preview domain), Session TTL working (24-hour expiry implemented), Tenant isolation working (reports/attendance scoped to user's tenant). P3: Landing page has God Mode KPI screenshot, footer has Privacy/Terms/Security links and Calendly CTA, Login page has autocomplete='off', aria-labels on inputs, and forgot password link. Mobile responsiveness working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1/P2/P3 features verified working. CORS_ORIGINS is set to 'https://observability-sprint.preview.emergentagent.com' (not wildcard). Session TTL implemented with 24-hour expiry in core/__init__.py get_current_admin_user and get_current_portal_user functions. Tenant isolation working via _resolve_tenant helper in public_api.py and _resolve_report_tenant in reports.py. CSV Import at /admin/members/import with Planning Center auto-mapping (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Status, Campus patterns). Disputes scaffold at /api/platform/disputes returns summary with win_rate. Fraud risk at /api/platform/fraud/risk-scores returns risk_summary with high_value_transactions_30d. Landing page has God Mode KPI screenshot with Platform GMV $108.3M, Total Revenue $2.4M, Churches 8, Members 109,900. Footer has Privacy/Terms/Security links and Calendly CTA (https://calendly.com/solomonai). Login page has autocomplete='off' on email/password inputs, aria-label attributes, and forgot password link to /forgot-password. Mobile responsiveness working with hamburger menu toggle.

p2_session_ttl.details: 24-hour session expiry implemented in get_current_admin_user and get_current_portal_user

p2_tenant_isolation.details: _resolve_tenant and _resolve_report_tenant helpers derive tenant from authenticated user session

p1_csv_import_planning_center.details: CSV parse returns headers, preview, system_fields (including address fields), and auto_mapping for Planning Center patterns

p1_disputes_scaffold.details: GET /api/platform/disputes returns disputes list and summary with win_rate, open, won, lost counts

p1_fraud_risk_scores.details: GET /api/platform/fraud/risk-scores returns risk_summary with high_value_transactions_30d, overall_risk, and risk_rules

p3_landing_page_god_mode_kpi.details: Hero section shows God Mode platform screenshot with KPIs: Platform GMV $108.3M, Total Revenue $2.4M, Churches 8, Members 109,900

p3_landing_page_footer_links.details: Footer has Privacy, Terms, Security links and Calendly CTA (https://calendly.com/solomonai)

p3_login_page_autocomplete_off.details: Email and password inputs have autocomplete='off'

p3_login_page_aria_labels.details: Email input has aria-label='Email address', password input has aria-label='Password'

p3_login_page_forgot_password.details: Forgot password link present, links to /forgot-password

p3_mobile_responsiveness.details: Landing page responsive on mobile (390x844), hamburger menu toggle works, footer visible

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode
